description: RAG evaluation dataset. Each question has a single verifiable answer located in one document and section of the corpus.

questions.question: In what year and city was Nimbus Data Systems founded?
questions.expected_answer: In 2017, in Buenos Aires, Argentina.

questions.question: Who founded Nimbus Data Systems?
questions.expected_answer: Valeria Montoya and Andrés Liang.

questions.question: In which cities does the company have offices, and which one is the headquarters?
questions.expected_answer: Buenos Aires (headquarters), Bogotá, and Mexico City.

questions.question: What are the company's four core values?
questions.expected_answer: Clarity above all, ownership mindset, technical curiosity, and radical respect.

questions.question: Who is the VP of People?
questions.expected_answer: Camila Funes.

questions.question: What are the core hours during which the whole team must be available?
questions.expected_answer: From 10:00 to 16:00 Argentina Time (ART).

questions.question: What stipend do fully remote employees receive?
questions.expected_answer: A one-time USD 350 equipment stipend upon joining and a USD 40 monthly internet reimbursement.

questions.question: How many vacation business days does an employee with 6 years of tenure get?
questions.expected_answer: 25 business days (the 5-to-8-year tenure bracket).

questions.question: How many paid leave days are granted for moving (relocation)?
questions.expected_answer: 2 business days.

questions.question: How far in advance and on which platform must vacation be requested?
questions.expected_answer: At least 15 days in advance, through the Humand platform.

questions.question: How many unused vacation days can be carried over to the next year, and when do they expire?
questions.expected_answer: Up to 5 days, which expire on March 31.

questions.question: When are salaries deposited, and in which months are salary adjustments reviewed?
questions.expected_answer: They are deposited on the last business day of each month; adjustments are reviewed in April and October.

questions.question: How large is the annual learning budget per person?
questions.expected_answer: USD 800 per year, which can accrue for up to 2 years.

questions.question: How much is the referral bonus, and what condition must be met?
questions.expected_answer: USD 1,500 per successful hire who stays beyond 3 months.

questions.question: What is the daily meal per diem cap for trips to the United States or Europe?
questions.expected_answer: USD 90 per day.

questions.question: How long is the probation period for new hires, and when is the formal feedback conversation held?
questions.expected_answer: The probation period lasts 3 months, with formal feedback at the 45-day mark.

questions.question: What is the resignation notice period for leadership roles, and for how long can stock options be exercised after departure?
questions.expected_answer: 45 days' notice for leadership roles; vested stock options can be exercised for up to 90 days after departure.

questions.question: Who is the company's CISO?
questions.expected_answer: Marcos Ettinger.

questions.question: Since what year has the company held SOC 2 Type II certification?
questions.expected_answer: Since 2023, renewed annually.

questions.question: When is the ISO 27001 certification audit scheduled?
questions.expected_answer: For September 2026.

questions.question: What are the four information classification levels?
questions.expected_answer: Public, Internal, Confidential, and Restricted.

questions.question: What is the minimum required length for corporate passwords?
questions.expected_answer: 14 characters.

questions.question: What type of MFA must production administrators use?
questions.expected_answer: YubiKey physical security keys.

questions.question: Which corporate password manager does the company use?
questions.expected_answer: 1Password.

questions.question: How often is access to systems with Confidential or Restricted information reviewed?
questions.expected_answer: Quarterly.

questions.question: What is the maximum duration of just-in-time privilege elevation?
questions.expected_answer: 8 hours.

questions.question: How quickly are accounts deactivated after an employee's departure?
questions.expected_answer: Within 4 hours of the departure.

questions.question: Where must application credentials, tokens, and certificates be stored, and which tool scans commits for secrets?
questions.expected_answer: In HashiCorp Vault; secret scanning runs on every commit using Gitleaks.

questions.question: What encryption is used for data at rest, and what minimum TLS version for data in transit?
questions.expected_answer: AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit (TLS 1.2 only temporarily for legacy integrations, until December 2026).

questions.question: What are the RPO and RTO for production databases according to the security policy?
questions.expected_answer: RPO of 1 hour and RTO of 4 hours.

questions.question: For how many days are production backups retained?
questions.expected_answer: 35 days.

questions.question: How long are audit logs from production systems retained?
questions.expected_answer: 400 days in immutable storage.

questions.question: Which VPN solution is used for remote access, and which MDM manages corporate devices?
questions.expected_answer: WireGuard VPN and the Kandji MDM (with automatic lock after 5 minutes).

questions.question: What is the maximum first-response time for a Critical (S1) security incident?
questions.expected_answer: 30 minutes.

questions.question: Within what maximum timeframe must customers be notified of incidents involving personal data?
questions.expected_answer: Within a maximum of 72 hours.

questions.question: Which firm performed the 2025 penetration test, and what was the phishing-simulation click rate in the second half of 2025?
questions.expected_answer: Carbide Security performed the 2025 pentest; the click rate was 3.1%.

questions.question: What is the maximum validity of an exception to the security policy?
questions.expected_answer: 90 days, renewable only once, requested in writing to the CISO.

questions.question: What was the Q1 2026 revenue, and what was the year-over-year growth?
questions.expected_answer: USD 6.7 million, year-over-year growth of 59.5% compared to USD 4.2 million in Q1 2025.

questions.question: What was the ARR at the end of Q1 2026?
questions.expected_answer: USD 26.8 million.

questions.question: Who led the Series B round, for how much, and when did it close?
questions.expected_answer: Meridian Growth Partners led a USD 40 million Series B, closed in February 2026.

questions.question: Which existing investors participated in the Series B?
questions.expected_answer: Altavista Capital and Sur Ventures.

questions.question: Which product version was launched in February 2026, and what was its main new feature?
questions.expected_answer: NimbusVault 3.2, featuring the new hybrid search engine.

questions.question: How many integrations did the connector marketplace have at the close of Q1 2026?
questions.expected_answer: 41 integrations.

questions.question: How many active customers did the company have at the close of Q1 2026, and how many were new enterprise customers in the quarter?
questions.expected_answer: 627 active customers and 23 new enterprise customers.

questions.question: What was the net revenue retention (NRR) in Q1 2026?
What was the monthly customer churn in Q1 2026, and how did it change from the previous quarter?
questions.expected_answer: 1.8%, an improvement of 0.3 points from 2.1% in Q4 2025.

questions.question: What was the NPS in Q1 2026?
questions.expected_answer: 56 (up from 51 in Q4 2025).

questions.question: What was the quarter's CAC and the LTV/CAC ratio?
questions.expected_answer: CAC of USD 11,400 and an LTV/CAC ratio of 4.6.

questions.question: What is the average annual contract value per enterprise customer?
How many active customers does the company have in Latin America?
questions.expected_answer: 178 customers.

questions.question: What was the gross margin in Q1 2026?
How much cash did the company have at the close of Q1 2026, and what is the estimated runway?
questions.expected_answer: USD 19.3 million in cash and an estimated runway of 28 months.

questions.question: When is the company projected to reach operating break-even?
What was the annualized voluntary attrition in Q1 2026, and how many active openings are planned for Q2?
questions.expected_answer: Attrition of 8.4%; 24 openings are planned, concentrated in Engineering (14) and Sales (7).

questions.question: What ARR target was set for the close of Q2 2026?
questions.expected_answer: Reaching USD 30 million in ARR by 06/30/2026.

questions.question: What percentage of ARR do the top 10 customers represent?
questions.expected_answer: 31% of ARR.

questions.question: What is the production base URL of the NimbusVault API?
questions.expected_answer: https://api.nimbusvault.io/v3

questions.question: Which technology is used as the API Gateway?
questions.expected_answer: Kong.

questions.question: What prefixes do API keys have depending on the environment?
questions.expected_answer: nv_live_ for production and nv_test_ for sandbox.

questions.question: How quickly does API key revocation take effect?
questions.expected_answer: In under 60 seconds.

questions.question: What scopes can API keys have?
questions.expected_answer: Read, write, and admin.

questions.question: How many requests per minute does the Pro plan allow?
questions.expected_answer: 600 requests per minute.

questions.question: What is the daily document ingestion limit of the Starter plan?
questions.expected_answer: 1,000 documents per day.

questions.question: What HTTP code does the API return when rate limits are exceeded, and in which headers are the limits reported?
questions.expected_answer: It returns 429; limits are reported in X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset.

questions.question: What is the maximum file size accepted by POST /documents?
Which states does a document pass through during processing?
questions.expected_answer: queued, processing, ready, or failed.

questions.question: What is the default search mode of the POST /search endpoint?
questions.expected_answer: hybrid (the available modes are semantic, keyword, and hybrid).

questions.question: What are the default and maximum values of the top_k parameter in searches?
questions.expected_answer: Default 10; maximum 100.

questions.question: Which embeddings model does the platform use, and how many dimensions does it have?
questions.expected_answer: The in-house nimbus-embed-2 model, with 1,024 dimensions.

questions.question: For how long are idempotency keys remembered?
questions.expected_answer: For 24 hours.

questions.question: Which internal code corresponds to an unsupported file format, and with which HTTP code is it returned?
questions.expected_answer: NV-1042, with HTTP 422.

questions.question: How are webhook deliveries signed, and how many times are failed deliveries retried?
questions.expected_answer: With HMAC-SHA256 in the X-Nimbus-Signature header; they are retried up to 8 times with exponential backoff over a maximum of 24 hours.

questions.question: How far in advance are breaking changes to the API announced, at minimum?
questions.expected_answer: At least 90 days in advance.

questions.question: For how many weeks does the technical buddy accompany a new Engineering hire?
questions.expected_answer: For the first 6 weeks.

questions.question: What equipment does an Engineering hire receive on their first day?
questions.expected_answer: A MacBook Pro M4 with 32 GB of RAM, already enrolled in the MDM.

questions.question: When is access to AWS and production environments enabled for a new hire?
questions.expected_answer: Upon completing the security training (it is not granted on day 1).

questions.question: Which versions of Node.js and PostgreSQL does the stack use?
questions.expected_answer: Node.js 22 LTS and PostgreSQL 16 (on RDS).

questions.question: Which tool is used for feature flags?
questions.expected_answer: LaunchDarkly.

questions.question: What is the monorepo called, and which tools manage it?
questions.expected_answer: nimbus-core, managed with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo.

questions.question: Which script prepares the local environment, and at which URL does the platform run with pnpm dev?
questions.expected_answer: ./scripts/bootstrap.sh; the platform runs at http://localhost:4200.

questions.question: What format do branch names follow?
questions.expected_answer: type/LIN-123-short-description, where LIN-123 is the Linear ticket.

questions.question: How many approvals does each pull request require, and what minimum test coverage does the pipeline enforce?
questions.expected_answer: 2 approvals plus sign-off from CODEOWNERS, and a minimum coverage of 80% on changed lines.

questions.question: On which days and until what time are production deployments allowed?
questions.expected_answer: Monday through Thursday until 16:00 ART; no Friday deployments except hotfixes approved by the on-call lead.

questions.question: How long are sprints, on which day do they start, and at what time is the daily standup?
questions.expected_answer: 2-week sprints starting on Wednesdays; the daily is at 10:15 ART and lasts a maximum of 15 minutes.

questions.question: In which week should a new hire's first pull request be merged?
questions.expected_answer: During week 2, with a ticket labeled good-first-issue.

questions.question: What is the compensation per on-call week in Engineering?
questions.expected_answer: USD 250 per week, plus time off in lieu for overnight incidents.

questions.question: From what point does a new hire join the primary on-call rotation?
questions.expected_answer: Starting in the third month (the first month is spent as a shadow).

questions.question: When do the internal Nimbus Fridays demos take place?
questions.expected_answer: On the last Friday of each month at 15:00 ART.

questions.question: Where are architecture decisions (ADRs) recorded?
questions.expected_answer: In the repository, under docs/adr/.

questions.question: What is the primary AWS region, and what is the disaster recovery (DR) region?
questions.expected_answer: Primary us-east-1 and DR sa-east-1 (São Paulo).

questions.question: Which EKS version runs in production, and how is the Qdrant cluster composed?
questions.expected_answer: EKS 1.31; Qdrant runs on a 6-node cluster spread across 3 availability zones.

questions.question: What is the availability SLA committed to customers, and where is the platform's public status communicated?
questions.expected_answer: 99.9% monthly; the status is communicated at status.nimbusvault.io.

questions.question: What is the first-response time for a SEV1 incident?
questions.expected_answer: 15 minutes, with a status page update within 30 minutes.

questions.question: How does a SEV1 incident escalate automatically if it is not acknowledged?
questions.expected_answer: It escalates to the Platform lead at 10 minutes and to the CTO at 20 minutes without acknowledgment.

questions.question: On what day and time does the weekly on-call rotation rotate, and when is the secondary paged?
questions.expected_answer: It rotates on Mondays at 14:00 UTC; the secondary is paged if the primary does not acknowledge within 5 minutes.

questions.question: What is the alert threshold for the API's p99 latency?
questions.expected_answer: Above 1,200 ms for 5 minutes.

questions.question: How long does a full deployment rollback from ArgoCD take?
questions.expected_answer: Less than 4 minutes.

questions.question: When is the scheduled maintenance window, and how far in advance must impactful maintenance be announced?
questions.expected_answer: Saturdays from 03:00 to 05:00 UTC, announced on the status page at least 72 hours in advance.

questions.question: Within what timeframe must the post-mortem of a SEV1 or SEV2 incident be published?
questions.expected_answer: Within 5 business days of resolution, in blameless format.

questions.question: How often are Qdrant snapshots taken, and how long did the latest disaster recovery drill take?
questions.expected_answer: Snapshots are taken every 6 hours; the DR drill on May 9, 2026 completed full recovery in 3 hours and 12 minutes.
